general_facts: App uses Vanilla JS with custom controller.js
Firebase used for Auth and DB
Reporting uses sql.js for client-side SQL

user_sync.fact: Manual users created in RTDB are provisioned in Firebase Auth when an admin sets their password for the first time.

Auth.A: Firebase Auth on client, JWT token passed to /api, server.js verifies token.

Reporting.A: No, sql.js runs in the browser. Data is synced from /api into local SQLite.
